meta.title: Followprint — Your Social Fingerprint
meta.description: Analyze your Instagram data privately. See pending requests, non-mutual followers, and more.

hero.title: Your Social Fingerprint
hero.subtitle: See who ignored your follow request, who's not following you back, and more — 100% private, nothing leaves your browser.

guide.title: How to Get Your Data
guide.subtitle: It takes 2 minutes to request. Instagram sends it within a few hours.

step1.title: Open Instagram Settings
step1.desc: Go to your profile, tap the menu (three lines), then tap Settings and Privacy.

step2.title: Go to Accounts Center
step2.desc: Tap Accounts Center at the top, then Your information and permissions.

step3.title: Download Your Information
step3.desc: Tap Download your information, then Request a download.

step4.title: Select Data & Format
step4.desc: Choose your account, select Some of your information, check Followers and Following. Any format (JSON or HTML) works.

step5.title: Submit & Wait
step5.desc: Tap Create files. Instagram will notify you when it's ready (usually within minutes to a few hours).

step6.title: Download & Upload Here
step6.desc: Download the ZIP file from Instagram's notification, then drag it into the upload area below.

upload.title: Upload Your Data
upload.dragDrop: Drag & drop your Instagram ZIP file here
upload.hint: Your data stays in your browser. Nothing is uploaded to any server.

error.INVALID_ZIP: This doesn't look like an Instagram data export. Make sure you downloaded the ZIP from Instagram.
error.UNSUPPORTED_FORMAT: Please upload a .zip file from Instagram's data export.
error.default: Something went wrong. Please try again with a valid Instagram data export.

influencer.name: The Influencer
influencer.desc: You have a strong presence. People follow you more than you follow others.

butterfly.name: Social Butterfly
butterfly.desc: You're a connector. High mutuality shows you build real relationships.

observer.name: The Observer
observer.desc: You follow many but stay in the background. A silent explorer of content.

selective.name: The Selective
selective.desc: Quality over quantity. You carefully curate who you follow.

explorer.name: The Explorer
explorer.desc: Always discovering new accounts. You're not afraid to send that follow request.

minimalist.name: The Minimalist
minimalist.desc: Less is more. Your Instagram circle is small but meaningful.

footer.privacy: 100% client-side. Your data never leaves your browser.
